mapper.select: SELECT baseline_group_jids FROM account_group_baseline WHERE account_id = #{accountId} LIMIT 1
SELECT g.id FROM group_link_preview p INNER JOIN group_link g ON g.id = p.group_link_id WHERE g.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.group_jid = #{groupJid} ORDER BY g.id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_link_preview ( group_link_id, group_jid, wa_subject, member_size, owner_phone, announce_only, avatar_url, last_preview_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{groupLinkId}, #{groupJid}, #{subject}, #{memberSize}, #{ownerPhone}, #{announceOnly}, #{avatarUrl}, #{syncAt}, #{now}, #{now} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE group_jid = VALUES(group_jid), wa_subject = COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(VALUES(wa_subject)), ''), wa_subject), member_size = COALESCE(VALUES(member_size), member_size), owner_phone = COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(VALUES(owner_phone)), ''), owner_phone), announce_only = COALESCE(VALUES(announce_only), announce_only), avatar_url = COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(VALUES(avatar_url)), ''), avatar_url), last_preview_at = VALUES(last_preview_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO account_group_membership ( account_id, group_link_id, group_jid, is_admin, last_seen_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accountId}, #{groupLinkId}, #{groupJid}, #{admin}, #{lastSeenAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE group_link_id = VALUES(group_link_id), is_admin = VALUES(is_admin), last_seen_at = VALUES(last_seen_at), deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS accountId, a.protocol_account_id AS protocolAccountId FROM account_group_membership m INNER JOIN account a ON a.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND a.id = m.account_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.protocol_account_id IS NOT NULL AND a.protocol_account_id != '' INNER JOIN account_state s ON s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id AND s.account_id = a.id AND s.login_state = #{onlineLoginState} WHERE m.group_link_id = #{groupLinkId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(m.is_admin, 0) DESC, COALESCE(m.last_seen_at, 0) DESC, m.id ASC LIMIT 1
